ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition of the part */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the part */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the part */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level of the part */,
  "max_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level of the part */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point of the part */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time of the part */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure of the part */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of the part */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory of the part */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the part was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the part was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES part_subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES part_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES part_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the warehouse was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the warehouse was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_images_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part the document belongs to */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_documents_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part the price belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the part */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the price was set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the price was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the price was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_prices_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subcategory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subcategory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_warehouse" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Stock level of the part in the warehouse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id", "warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the shipment belongs to */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date when the shipment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the shipment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the shipment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_movement" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part moved */,
  "from_warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse the part was moved from */,
  "to_warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse the part was moved to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part moved */,
  "movement_date" TEXT /* Date when the movement was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the movement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the movement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_movement_to_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_movement_from_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_movement_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)
